backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend canister with user profile management (get, save, register, check membership) and access control enforcement using a MixinAuthorization mixin and AccessControl module.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Contact page CTA buttons, Footer social links, Navbar Join Us button, etc.) to their source files, component dependencies, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React pages, components, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, accent, chart colors, sidebar) applied globally to all elements and the body.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Awami League Website SPA, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the TypeScript entry point via a module script tag.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with nine routes (Home, History, Ideology, Organisation, Chhatra League, Contact, Members, News, Resources) all wrapped in the shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer rendered as a 4-column grid featuring brand info, social media icon links (Facebook, X, YouTube) with a 'Follow Us' label, navigation links including a 'Join Us' external link, and a 'Connect' column with official contact links.
frontend/src/components/IdeologyPillar.t: Reusable card component for displaying one of the four ideological pillars, accepting a name, Lucide icon, description, and a color variant (green/red/gold/teal) that drives themed border, background, and icon styling.
frontend/src/components/KeyFactsStrip.ts: Horizontal strip component displaying four static party facts (founded, headquarters, ideology, student wing) in a responsive 2×2 to 4-column grid on a dark green background.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Simple layout wrapper that composes Navbar, a flex-growing main content area, and Footer into a full-height column structure.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive fixed navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, mobile menu toggle, active route highlighting, and Internet Identity login/logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/NavigationCard.t: A styled card component that links to a given route, displaying an icon, title, description, and a 'Learn More' label with configurable accent colors.
frontend/src/components/OrgChart.tsx: Recursive organizational chart component that renders a tree of nodes with vertical/horizontal connectors, styled differently by depth level.
frontend/src/components/TimelineEvent.ts: Displays a single timeline entry with a year badge, title, description, and a connecting line, supporting left/right side alignment.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and login status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching the caller's user profile, checking membership status, and registering a new member profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers with OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ChhatraLeague.tsx: Renders an informational page about Bangladesh Chhatra League, displaying its history through a timeline of key contributions (1948–present) with icons, descriptions, and external Wikipedia links.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Renders a Contact/Membership page with a hero section, party headquarters contact details (address, phone, email), and links to the official Awami League join and contact pages.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Renders a timeline-based history page of the Awami League from 1947 onward, with richly linked descriptions referencing Wikipedia for key events, people, and places.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the homepage with a hero section, navigation cards to major site sections, a key achievements timeline, party identity images (badge, flag, symbol), and a featured news notice.
frontend/src/pages/Ideology.tsx: Renders the Ideology & Policies page, displaying the four pillars of Mujibism (nationalism, democracy, secularism, socialism) and policy sections covering economics, education, social welfare, and foreign policy.
frontend/src/pages/MembersArea.tsx: Members-only page that handles Internet Identity login, new member registration with a display name form, and renders a dashboard with announcements, resources, and a member directory for authenticated registered users.
frontend/src/pages/News.tsx: Static news page displaying four cards (Latest News, Party News, Election Manifesto, Newsletter) that link out to official Bangladesh Awami League external URLs.
frontend/src/pages/Organisation.tsx: Static page describing the Awami League's organisational structure, including an org chart, hierarchical level descriptions, affiliated party wings, and a historical table of party presidents.
frontend/src/pages/Resources.tsx: Static resources page listing eight curated articles on Awami League policy, history, and ideology, each linking to the official publications page with category-colour-coded badges.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL query parameters from both standard query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, while enabling dark mode and importing typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 25) for an Awami League political organization website, documenting architectural notes, reference sources, known issues, and a detailed list of existing implemented features.
